root.sql:
select round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('100', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_1CA ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('200', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_2BK ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('300', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_33I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('400', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_34I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('500', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_35I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('600', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_36I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('700', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_37I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('800', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_38I ,round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('900', '!year!' , '!month!' ) , 2 ) as coll_39I
,(case when '!month!' = 1 then round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('D00', '!year!' - 1 , 12 ) , 2 ) else round( PKA_REP_SCQ.fp_get_asset_old_group('D00', '!year!' , '!month!' - 1 ) , 2 ) end) as coll_4DP
,'!manager_name_1!' as manager_name ,'!position_1!' as position
